subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Beauty of Truth! May thy name be Qásim, thy path be steadfast, thy reality be firm, and thy qualities be perfected. Bear thou witness that this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیدای جمال حق اسمت قاسم رسمت راسخ حقیقتت ثابت صفتت کامل باد گوای که این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual springtime, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
